name: Apricot Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fruit and soak it for 8 hours in the water in which it was soaked.
2. Place the fruit over heat in its soaking water.
3. Simmer until very soft, then rub through a coarse sieve to remove seeds and skin.
4. Return the pulp to the pot and bring it to a boil.
5. Add sugar and simmer gently for 40-45 minutes, stirring almost constantly as it scorches easily.
6. Add cinnamon while cooking.
7. Pour into sterilized half-pints, leaving at least 1/2 inch of headspace.
8. Seal with lids and screw bands firmly in place.
9. Process jars in boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
